speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: seene mein itni bhari jakdan mehsus hone lagi jaise meri saans wahin ruk jayegi
text: Seene mein itni bhari jakdan mehsus hone lagi jaise meri saans wahin ruk jayegi. Aaj nanad ke liye rishta wale aaye the par unhone yeh keh kar mana kar diya ki 5 saal baad bhi badi bahu ke bache nahi hue toh zaroor inke khandaan mein khot hai. Sasu-maa ke taane sunte hi pura din is joint family ki rasoi mein kaam karte hue meri peeth aur gardan mein aisi aithan ho rahi hai ki ab khade rehna bhi mushkil lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact body phrase back to validate the Somatization before exploring the stressor.
text: Abhi tumhare seene mein itni bhari jakdan mehsus hone lagi jaise meri saans wahin ruk jayegi, aur in taanon ke beech rasoi ka kaam tumhari peeth aur gardan ki aithan ko aur badha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul saans nahi aati. Sasu-maa ne sabke samne kaha ki meri wajah se unki beti ka ghar nahi bas raha. Pura joint family mujhe aise ghur raha tha jaise main sach mein is khandaan par koi kala daag hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a shorter restatement focusing on the feared relational consequence.
text: Sabki un chubhti nazaron ko mehsoos karke aisa lag raha hai jaise is bhare-poore ghar mein tumhara wajood sirf ek bojh ya daag ban kar reh gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: seene mein itni bhari jakdan mehsus hone lagi jaise meri saans wahin ruk jayegi
text: Bojh hi toh samajhte hain sab. 5 saal ho gaye shadi ko, har din rasoi mein chulhe ke samne guzarta hai. Phir bhi jab sasu-maa ne biradari ka naam lekar mujhe khota bola, toh seene mein itni bhari jakdan mehsus hone lagi jaise meri saans wahin ruk jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of her suffering and how the recurring taunts reignite the somatic pain.
text: Pichle paanch saalon se is rasoi aur ghar ko apne khoon-paseene se seenchne ke baad bhi, jab biradari ke naam par aise teer chalaye jaate hain toh wahi jakdan har baar laut aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul laut aati hai. Main sochti hoon ki aakhir meri galti kya hai isme? Par phir bhi sab meri hi kami nikalte hain. Badi bahu hone ka poora farz nibha rahi hoon, par ye peeth ki aithan mujhe andar tak nichod rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty-based role of 'badi bahu' that gets ignored in the face of judgment.
text: Badi bahu hone ki poori zimmedari aur farz nibhane ke bawajood jab badle mein sirf taane milte hain, toh yeh aithan jism ke sath sath aatma ko bhi thaka deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Thakan toh hai, par kabhi kabhi sach mein lagta hai ki shayad meri hi kismat kharab hai jiski aanch meri nanad par aa rahi hai. Yeh guilt aate hi gardan ki aithan aur chubhne lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how this internalized guilt and the physical pain connect when she takes the blame.
text: Jab tumhare andar apni kismat ko lekar aisi soch uthti hai ki sab kuch tumhari wajah se bigad raha hai, tab yeh gardan ki aithan aur tumhara wo guilt aapas mein kis tarah jud jate hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: seene mein itni bhari jakdan mehsus hone lagi jaise meri saans wahin ruk jayegi
text: Aise jud jate hain ki main khud ko kasoorwar manne lagti hoon aur ek dum helpless feel karti hoon. Aaj jab sasu-maa ro rahi thi, toh mujhe dekh kar seene mein itni bhari jakdan mehsus hone lagi jaise meri saans wahin ruk jayegi. Jaise maine sab barbaad kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying helplessness and feeling trapped by the blame of the joint family.
text: Lagta hai ki is joint family mein sabki khushi ka bojh apne kandhon par uthate uthate, tum khud ko ek gehari 'trapped' ya phasi hui sthiti mein mehsus karne lagi ho, jahan bina tumhari galti ke bhi har ansu ka guilt tumhara dam ghont deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Phasi hui hi hoon. Na mayke wapas ja sakti hoon izzat ke darr se, aur na yahan koi sukoon hai. Har koi rishte aate hi 'khushkhabri' ka puchte hain. Roti belte belte aankhon se aansu nikal aate hain is ghutan mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her feeling of being trapped as culturally common for women while separating her worth from childbirth.
text: Hamare samaj mein jab ek bahu ka wajood sirf bacche ki umeed aur khandaan badhane se jod diya jata hai, toh aisi ghutan hona bilkul natural hai; par sach yeh hai ki tumhari qeemat aur tumhara astitva sirf ek khushkhabri se kahin zyada bada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baatein sun kar andar thoda dhiraj aa raha hai. Warna toh mujhe sach mein lagne laga tha ki mere jaisi banjh aurat ka koi hak nahi hai. Par yeh sasu-maa ke taane aur biradari ka darr asani se peecha nahi chhodta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic observation to normalize how common this objectification is in traditional joint families.
text: Badi bahu ke is kirdar mein aisi apekshayein aur har thodi baat par khot nikalna hamare yahan bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki khandaan ki izzat ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khandaan ki izzat... bas yahi ek cheez hai jisne poori aurat jaat ko daba rakha hai. Main raat-raat bhar jaagti hoon is dar se ki kal subah sasu-maa phirse koi naya taana dengi. Tension se gardan ki aithan theek hi nahi hoti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how the anticipated relational abuse ruins her rest and sustains the physical tension.
text: Agli subah wahi sasu-maa ke taane aur wahi ghar walon ka teekha bartao dobara jhelne ka darr tumhari raaton ki neend cheen kar gardan ki aithan ko kabhi kam nahi hone deta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur saha nahi jata ab roz-roz ka yahi natak. Main is jakdan se aur is lagatar hone wali aithan se theek hona chahti hoon. Thodi shanti chahiye apne dimaag aur is shareer mein. Aap batao, aage ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a couple of unobtrusive somatic relaxation options suitable for a joint family context.
text: Agar tum aaj apne is bhari man aur aithan ko thoda aaram dena chahti ho, toh kya agle das minute ke liye kisi shant kamre mein baith kar lamba saans lena theek lagega, ya phir bas apni pasand ki koi purani dhun sunna behtar lagega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kamre mein akele baith kar saans lena theek lagega shanti se. Rasoi se bahar toh mujhe waise bhi kuch der jana hi padega abhi, sasu-maa aur nanad drawing room mein baithe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her step-by-step through the breathing space execution.
text: Pehle aahista se rasoi ka kaam wahin chhod kar apne kamre ka darwaza adha band karo… phir bistar par peeth tika kar baitho aur dheere dheere lambi saans lo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye khud ko time dena hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bina bataye kaam beech mein chhodna thoda ajeeb lag raha hai, par main yeh kar sakti hoon. 10 minute apne aap ko de hi sakti hoon. Bistar par aate hi peeth ko thoda sahara mila hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframe the physical response as the body processing heavy cultural pressure, not a flaw.
text: Tumhe shayad ajeeb lag raha hoga kaam chhodna, par asal mein yeh physical aithan tumhari body ka ek natural tareeqa hai yeh batane ka ki itne saalon ki khari-khoti aur joint family ka stress ab hadd se zyada ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein hadd cross ho chuki hai. Jab dekho tab khandaan ki khot aur rishte ki hi charcha. Mere bhi toh koi jazbaat hain as an individual. 10 minute akele shanti se baithne par sach mein thoda thehrav mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her reclaiming her own space outside the 'badi bahu' duty framework.
text: Unki umeedon aur badi bahu wale farz ki chakki se bahar aakar nikaale gaye yeh 10 minute, tumhe tumhari apni jaruraton aur wajood ke thoda kareeb laa rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... mujhe khud ko yaad dilana chahiye ki main sirf ek khandaan aage badhane ki machine nahi, ek insaan bhi hoon. Taano ne mere dimaag ko paralyze kar diya tha. Ab jakdan thodi loose feel ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she will maintain this realization to protect her peace tomorrow.
text: Jab yeh jakdan dheeli hoti hai aur tum ek insaan hone ki azaadi mehsoos karti ho, toh kal aane wale kisi bhi naye taane se khud ko bachane ke liye apni soch mein kya chhota badlav rakhna chahogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas khud ko yahi kahungi ki chahe sasu-maa kuch bhi bolein, un rishta walon ke jane aur nanad ke rejection mein meri koi direct galti nahi hai. Main apna guilt khud par हावी nahi hone dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her clear boundary and refusal to accept unfounded guilt.
text: Apne hisse ka sach pehchaan kar in be-buniyaad ilzamon ko seedhe nakar dena ek bohot badi samajhdari hai; tumhari is clear soch ne us thope gaye guilt ko hara kar tumhe nayi himmat di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, main abhi bhi ro rahi hoon thoda sa, par andar se bahut halke wali feeling aa rahi hai. Aisa lag raha hai jaise kisi ne bina judge kiye pehli baar meri pareshani ko deeply samjha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how the emotional release has brought her relief.
text: Itne dino aur mahino ki andruni rulaai ke baad, jab yeh baatein aur dard dil se bahar nikla toh gardan ki us purani aithan ko bhi aakhirkar ek sachhi rahat mil gayi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, rahat mili hai kaafi. Joint family mein abhi sab chup nahi rahenge aur sasu-maa ka bartaav achanak theek nahi hoga, par main ab dheere dheere apne aas paas thodi boundary set karne ki koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically normalize setting mental boundaries in a traditional home.
text: Joint family mein aisi roj-marra ki rok-tok aur chubhney wali baaton ko ek din mein poori tarah badla nahi ja sakta, isliye apne dimaag aur dil ke aage ek halki si deewar banana hamesha madadgar hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wo deewar zaroor banani padegi, taaki unki kadwahat sidha mere andar na utre. Main jab sham ko mere husband aayenge, toh unke sath ek shaant mahaul mein baat karna chahti hoon taaki unhe meri thakan ka andaza ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her establishing a relational safety net with her husband.
text: Sasu-maa ki teekhi aawaz ke aage dimaag mein chadar daal kar, apne pati ke sath ek samajh-bhara waqt bitana tumhare us rishte ko aur tumhari apni hifazat ko behtar banane ka ek asardaar raasta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, unhe pata hona chahiye. Unhone hamesha thoda support kiya hai, par main ladaai se darti thi isliye dard chupa leti thi. Aaj bina kisi ghusse ke bas apni physical problem aur mind state share karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she will gently initiate this conversation to ensure it remains a safe space.
text: Shaam ko jab tumhare husband ghar aayenge, toh us sukoon ke mahaul mein bina kisi ladaai ke is zaruri baat ko shuru karne ka sabse asaan aur halka tareeqa kya hoga?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main pehle unhe bas chai dungi aur unke din ke bare mein puchungi. Jab hum dono akele honge, tab main aaraam se apni gardan aur back pain ke bare mein bataungi, aur phir sasu-maa wali baat rakhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her thoughtful, conflict-free approach to advocating for herself.
text: Apne pati ke aane par is shanti se chai ke bahane apni baat rakhne ka yeh tareeqa tumhari us samajhdari ko darshata hai, jahan tum bina ghar ki shanti tode apne haq aur apni takleef dono ko sahi jagah dila rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sar ki naso mein aisi bhayankar dard uthi jaise dimaag abhi phat jayega
text: Devar ko dekhne aaye rishte walo ne achanak se mana kar diya kyunki kisi ne unhe mere PCOD aur infertility treatments ke baare mein bata diya tha aur unhe 'log kya kahenge' ka darr tha. Unke darwaze se nikalte hi mere sar ki naso mein aisi bhayankar dard uthi jaise dimaag abhi phat jayega. Apni lost identity aur in taanon ke beech mere pure badan mein itni ajeeb si thakan ghus gayi hai ki mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact somatic phrase to acknowledge the intense physical reaction.
text: Unke achanak mana karke darwaze se nikalte hi tumhare sar ki naso mein aisi bhayankar dard uthi jaise dimaag abhi phat jayega, aur hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... aur sab mujhe aise dekh rahe the jaise maine koi gunaah kar diya ho. Sasu maa ki nazron me toh main hi panauti ban gayi devar ke rishte ke liye. 'Log kya kahenge' ke chakkar me unhone meri infertility ko ek gaali bana diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue by softly mirroring her fear of being judged as an omen.
text: Gharwalo ki nazron me khud ko ek panauti samjha jana, aur apni infertility ko le kar logon ka yeh judgment sehna, tumhe andar se buri tarah tod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sar ki naso mein aisi bhayankar dard uthi jaise dimaag abhi phat jayega
text: Tutta hi toh feel kar rahi hoon. Ek toh PCOD ke treatments ne body kharab kar di hai, aur upar se in tano ne. Mere sar ki naso mein abhi bhi dard ho raha hai lagatar, jaise dimaag phat jayega. Pata nahi main kab tak ye sab jhel paungi is isolation mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational isolation and constant exposure to family taunts.
text: Ek taraf health ke issue ka akela lamba struggle, aur dusri taraf family ke un chubhne wale taanon ne tumhe is akelepan mein bohot thaka diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan itni hai ki uth ke bacchon ke liye ya kisi aur ke liye kuch kaam karne ki himmat nahi ho rahi aaj. Mujhe bas letne ka man kar raha hai par saas bahar aawazein laga rahi hain rasoi ke kaam ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the duration and how she pushes through this intense physical pain for daily chores.
text: Jab badan barf jaisa thanda ho aur dimaag dard se bhara ho, toh aisi bhari takleef ke beech sasu maa ki aawazein sun kar tum khud ko rasoi ke kaam ke liye aage aane par majboor kaise kar paati ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere pure badan mein itni ajeeb si thakan ghus gayi hai ki mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain
text: Karna hi padta hai. Agar main nahi uthi, toh aur do baatein sunayenge ki ab toh nakhre bhi shuru ho gaye inke. Mere pure badan mein itni ajeeb si thakan ghus gayi hai ki mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain, but fir bhi main apne aap ko ghaseet rahi hoon rozmarra ke kaamon mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying shame and trapped feeling related to her PCOD and the family's reaction.
text: Lagta hai in sab tano aur devar ka rishta tootne ke ilzaam ne tumhe poori tarah TRAPPED aur HELPLESS feel kara diya hai, jahan apne medical condition ko le kar ek deep SHAME mehsus karayi ja rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi baat hai. Jaise PCOD hona mera hi koi bada paap hai. Meri sari pehchaan, mere past ki achievements sab in logon ne ek side kar diye. Aur mera sharir ye bardaasht nahi kar paa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her bodily reaction against the harsh cultural reality surrounding fertility in India.
text: Humaare yahan aurton ki puri value sirf unki health aur family expectations se naap li jati hai, par PCOD ya infertility tumhari koi galti ya paap nahi hai. Jab aas-paas ke log tumhari pehchaan bhula kar itna bojh daalein, toh sharir ka dard se bharna aur thanda pad jana bilkul natural reaction hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main samajhti hoon ye meri galti nahi hai, par jab aap roz wahi sab sunte ho aur ghar aane wale rishte walon se chupaya jata hai apko jaise koi dagh ho, toh insaan apne astitva pe hi sharminda hone lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the stigma cue of feeling hidden away like a stain on the family.
text: Rishte walon se tumhe aise chhupa kar rakhna jaise tum koi daag ho, tumhe apne hi wajood par gehri sharmindagi mehsoos karata hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sar ki naso mein aisi bhayankar dard uthi jaise dimaag abhi phat jayega
text: Haan, yahi sharmindagi mere sar mein dard bankar baith gayi hai. Mere sar ki naso mein aisi bhayankar dard uthi jaise dimaag abhi phat jayega... Par main is haalat mein roz roz saas ke in tano aur rasoi ke kaam ke beech ab kya karoon, batao?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote validating the physical pain caused by infertility stigma.
text: Rishte ya bacchon ke matter mein ek aurat ke medical struggle ko uski kami bana kar tano ka nishana banana humari society mein bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi is pressure ke baare mein baat nahi karta kyunki izzat aur 'log kya kahenge' ka dar aage aa jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi darr toh meri zindagi tabah kar raha hai. Main aaj rasoi mein jane se pehle apna dimaag thoda shant karna chahti hoon, jisse ye naso ka dard thoda kam ho. Kya main 5 minute apne aap ko de sakti hoon inke bulane par bhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggest 2 brief somatic-focused actions she can take in the immediate 5 minutes to calm her nervous system.
text: Tum apna waqt bilkul le sakti ho. In 5 minute mein, kya tum abhi bed par seedhe let kar sirf apne dono thande hatho ko apni aankhon par halka sa rakh sakti ho, ya phir thoda sa thanda pani peekar kisi ek shaant jagah par baith kar bas lambi saansein le sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Hatho ko aankhon par rakhne wala step theek rahega. Meri aankhein waise hi thakan se bhari hui hain. 5 minute thoda andhera milega toh shayad naso ka dard thoda set ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her clearly through the execution of resting her eyes.
text: Pehle abhi aaram se bed par seedhe let jana... apne dono thande hatho ko dheere se apni aankhon aur mathe par rakhna... aur agle 5 minute tak sasu maa ki aawaz par dhyan na dete hue sirf apne aaram par focus karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sar ki naso mein aisi bhayankar dard uthi jaise dimaag abhi phat jayega
text: Haan, ye main karungi. Ye 5 minute sirf mere liye honge. Mere sar ki naso mein aisi bhayankar dard uthi jaise dimaag abhi phat jayega, shayad in 5 minute se phatne se bach jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on the 'panauti' label to detach her shame from the medical condition.
text: Yeh dhyan rakhna zaroori hai ki PCOD kisi ki value kam nahi karta; society ki is purani aur unfair soch ne tumhari health condition ko ek dagh bana diya hai, isme tumhara koi kasoor nahi aur tum koi panauti nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sun kar thoda sa bojh halka hua hai. Main bewajah un logon ke ignorance ko apna dard bana rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from accepting the stigma to recognizing their ignorance.
text: Pehle jis blame ko tum apna sharm aur apna dard bana kar khud par le rahi thi, ab tum usay unki galti aur unki samajh ki kami ki tarah dekh rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main ye haq unhe aur nahi de sakti ki wo meri body ke bare me mujhe ashamed feel karayen. Abhi 5 minute letne ke baad hi main rasoi me jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a simple forward-looking question to ground her before she steps into the kitchen.
text: Jab tum woh 5 minute pure karke apne andar shanti mehsoos karogi, toh rasoi mein kadam rakhte waqt apne aapko ek majboot aurat ke tor par kya yaad dilaogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main yaad dilaungi ki mere haath kaam kar sakte hain, main padhi likhi hoon. Unka rishta toota kyuki unhe achi soch nahi thi, mera usme koi fault nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her reclamation of her identity and abilities.
text: Apni padhai aur apni mehnati pehchaan ko aage rakh kar, tumne apne aap ko unki ghatiya soch aur taano se bilkul alag aur surakshit kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Aap se baat karke mere dimaag ka pressure kaafi halka ho gaya hai. Hath abhi bhi thande hain but mai ghabra nahi rahi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure her strength in handling the panic and preparing to face the day.
text: Is darr aur panic bhare mahaul ko shant karke apne andar dobara clarity lana, tumhari himmat aur self-awareness dono ko darshata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere pure badan mein itni ajeeb si thakan ghus gayi hai ki mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain
text: Thank you. Mere pure badan mein itni ajeeb si thakan ghus gayi hai ki mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain, par main bed par let kar ye 5 minute try karti hoon. Shayad thodi heat aayegi body mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her proactive step to care for her physical sensations.
text: Itni lammbi thakan aur akelepan ke baad, aakhirkaar ab tum apni body ko woh zaruri garmahat aur aaram dene ki koshish karne ja rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, I will do this right now. Phir ja kar rasoi me help karungi, varna kalesh badhega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ensure she is okay to log off.
text: Rasoi mein jaane se theek pehle, jab tum in 5 minute ke aaram ke sath khadi hogi, toh kya us samay ke liye tum khud ko tayar mehsoos kar rahi ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main tayar hoon. Kam se kam ab dimaag nahi fat raha. Thank you.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the end of the pain spike.
text: Jo dard ekdum panic aur darr bankar baith gaya tha, ab us darr ko peche chhod kar tum rasoi mein jaane ke liye khud ko tayaar kar chuki ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, thank you for being here. Main aaram se jaati hoon. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm sign-off.
text: Apni takleef ko theek se process karna aur aage badhne ki tumhari taqat sach mein bohat ahem hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bye. Dhanyawad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Safe close.
text: In 5 minute ke chhote se apne waqt ko ache se lena, apna poora dhyan rakhna aur take care.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai
text: Mere pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai aur lagatar chakkar aa rahe hain. Choti nanad ki kundali milne ke baad bhi rishta walo ne ladki walo ko isliye mana kar diya kyunki unhe lagta hai ki is ghar ki badi bahu 'baanjh' hai aur mera saaya manhoos hai. Jab Saas ne is baat par poore sasural ke aage mera tamasha banaya, toh meri aakhon ke aage itna andhera chha gaya ki laga main abhi gir jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the exact physical complaint of burning sensation and dizziness to validate her somatic distress using Lens A.
text: Sun ke aisa lag raha hai ki sach mein tumhare pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai, aur us tamashe ka asar seedha in chakkar aur aakhon ke andhere ke roop mein dikh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek se khadi bhi nahi ho paa rahi. Sabke saamne mujhe baanjh aur manhoos bola gaya, saas ne itna sunaya. Mujhe toh samajh nahi aa raha saans kaise loon, chhati mein ekdum bojh sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational pressure of being humiliated by her mother-in-law in front of the family using Lens C.
text: Poore parivaar ke saamne jab saas ne aisi baatein sunayi, toh us waqt sabke beech akele khade rehna aur us bojh ko jhelna ekdum saans rok dene wala mehsoos hua hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai
text: Sach mein saans ruki hui hai. Meri kya galti hai isme? Doctors ke theek bolne ke baad bhi mujhe manhoos bula rahe hain. Jab bhi wo shabad yaad aate hain, wahi pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai aisa lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of permanently being blamed and labeled as inauspicious by the family using Lens E.
text: Is manhoosiyat ke tanz aur sabke saamne lagataar aisi baatein sunne ke baad, andar hi andar yeh dar aur ghabrahat ban gayi hai ki shayad ab hamesha tum par hi ungli uthegi har cheez ke tootne par.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh darr hai mujhe. Badi bahu hone ka farz nibhate hue ghar sambhalti hoon din raat, phir bhi izzat nahi mili. Biradari wale aur baaki log ghar aayenge toh mere baare mein kya kahenge? Aise toh log bolenge isme hi khot hai, jeena hi mushkil ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used soft restatement of the duty/role without probing to acknowledge the stigma cue safely using Lens B.
text: Badi bahu hone ki saari zimmedariyan din raat uthane ke baad bhi yeh sochna pad raha hai ki biradari kya bolegi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi nahi sochta mere baare mein ki mujhe kaisa lag raha hoga. Mera toh wajood hi khatam ho gaya hai sasural mein. Bas rote-rote aakhon ke aage aur andhera aa raha hai aur chakkar ruk nahi rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a gentle exploratory question to connect her feeling of being non-existent to her physical symptoms.
text: Jab aakhon ke saamne yeh andhera aur chakkar ekdum aur badh jate hain, toh uss waqt dimaag mein sabse zyada kya baat ghoom rahi hoti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag mein bas yahi ghoomta hai ki mera koi thikana nahi. Tamasha banne ki jo beizzati thi na, wo andar aag ki tarah jala rahi hai sab kuch. Na yahan kisi ki sagi hoon, na waapis mayke ja sakti hoon izzat ke darr se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core conflict of being trapped and the deep unexpressed helplessness fueling her bodily symptoms.
text: Lagta hai is beizzati aur sabke saamne manhoos kehlaye jaane ke baad, na sasural mein apna pan milna aur na mayke ja paana, is wajah se tum ek bohot gahri HELPLESSNESS mehsoos kar rahi ho jo ab pet ki jalan aur chakkar ban kar bahar aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul, main bilkul laachar hoon. Agar apne mayke gayi toh wahan bhai-bhabhi ke aage maa-baap ka sir neacha hoga ki beti rishta tod aayi. Aur yahan inke tanz meri jaan le rahe hain. Ek ghutan si ho rahi hai har waqt.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated the cultural reality of a woman's burden in marriage and separated her true worth from the lack of a child.
text: Apne mayke ki izzat aur sasural ki ghutan ke beech is tarah phas jana kisi ke liye bhi gehra dukh bhara ho sakta hai, kyunki hamare yahan auraton ko hamesha 'santan' hone se tolte hain, par iska matlab yeh bilkul nahi ki tumhari apni koi value nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai
text: Aapne sahi kaha par reality mein toh bahu ki value wahi se mani jati hai. Meri choti nanad ka rishta tootne ka dosh bhi mujh par aa gaya. Pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai ye sab yaad karke, bas chain nahi mil raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared a systemic anecdote about how common it is to scapegoat the eldest daughter-in-law to normalise her situation.
text: Ghar ki badi bahu par bina baat ka dosh dalna ya unhe kundali aur kismat ke liye zimmedar thehrana hamare yahan bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka issue nahi hai, lekin koi iske khilaf bolega nahi kyunki sab parivaar ki 'shaanti' aur naam bachana chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi baat hai na, shaanti bachane ke chakkar mein humesha main hi chup reh jati hoon. Par ab body jawab de rahi hai lagta hai. Chakkar itne hain ki aaj mujhse toh rasoi ka kaam bhi nahi ho pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the temporal duration of her suppressing her voice taking a physical toll on her daily duties using Lens D.
text: Itne lambe waqt se chup reh kar sasural ki shaanti bachate bachate, ab tumhara shareer is kadr thak chuka hai ki rozana rasoi ka kaam karna bhi bhari padne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bilkul bhari pad raha hai, ab mujhse aur nahi saha ja raha ye chakkar aur ghabrahat. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aap batao kya karoon ki main kam se kam theek se khadi toh ho paaun apni jagah se?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered two small somatic grounding options compatible with her homemaker setting to break the physical panic cycle.
text: Abhi sabse zaroori hai is andhere ko kam karna, uske liye hum 2 choti cheezein dekh sakte hain. Rasoi ka kaam thodi der chhod kar, ya toh tum kisi khidki ke paas 5 minute baith kar tazi saans le sakti ho, ya ek glass thanda pani peekar apne gale ki jalan ko shant kar sakti ho. Kya asaan lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Uth kar khidki ke paas jaane ki himmat toh nahi hai, abhi chakkar aa rahe hain kaafi. Main zameen par hi baithi hoon, mujhe lagta hai ek glass thanda pani peena shayad theek rahega mere liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked through the simple act of grounding and drinking water step by step.
text: Pehle apni peeth deewar ke sahare tika kar bilkul aaram se baith jao... phir ek ghunt thanda pani piyo aur dheere se lambi saans andar lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye apne in chakkar ko kam karne ke liye karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main koshish kar rahi hoon... deewar ke sahare tika liya hai khud ko. Paani ka ek ghunt piya maine. Gale ki jalan toh waisi hi hai, par chhati ka bojh thoda sa kam mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframed her somatic symptoms as a structural result of absorbing patriarchal blame, normalizing her physical pain.
text: Yeh chakkar aur jalan achanak nahi hote, darasal hamare yahan jab ek bahu par kundali aur 'baanjh' hone ka saara dosh bina wajah thop diya jata hai, toh us beizzati ko na bol paane ki wajah se shareer khud hi is physical dukh ke roop mein bolne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai
text: Sahi keh rahe hain, us beizzati aur sharmindagi ka boj hi hai ye sab. Kal tak main unki kitni seva kar rahi thi aur aaj unhone mujhe poore ghar ke samne tamasha bana diya. Pet mein ek aisi jalan shuru hui jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai ki ro lu, par aansu nahi aa rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational betrayal of the family turning against her despite her service using Lens C.
text: Tumne apni taraf se bina ruke unki seva ki, lekin badle mein jab unhone poore ghar ke saamne saath chhod kar beizzat kiya, toh woh aahat aur dhokha andar tak rula raha hai bhale aansu bahar nahi aa rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhoka hi toh hai. Mere pati bhi chup chap khade rahe wahan jab saas mujhe suna rahi thi. Agar wo ek lafz bol dete mere haq mein us waqt, toh ye chakkar nahi aate mujhe aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational element of her husband's silence intensifying her physical weakness using Lens B (role/duty).
text: Apne pati se ummeed thi ki woh ek patni ki taraf apna farz nibhayenge aur saath denge, par unki is chuppi ne tumhe is bheed mein aur bhi akela aur kamzor kar diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akeli toh main hoon. Koi kisi ka nahi hota is ghar mein. Par ab soch rahi hoon ki aise inki baato par rotay rehne se toh meri tabiyat hi kharab hogi aur bimar padungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the shift over time where she realizes crying hurts her own body using Lens D.
text: Ab dheere dheere yeh samajh aa raha hai ki aage bhi apna waqt aur body ko is tarah girane se dukh aur bimari sirf tumhe hi jhelni padegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main bimar padi toh paani dene wala bhi koi nahi aayega mujhe. Mujhe khud hi theek hona padega. Thoda aur pani peeti hoon, chakkar pehle se toh theek lag rahe hain abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed her active choice to prioritize her bodily health over the household drama.
text: Apne shareer ka is waqt aaram se khayal rakhna aur khud ko sambhal kar do ghoont paani aur peene ka tumhara yeh chota sa kadam sach mein bohot acha faisla hai khud ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, dhire dhire koshish toh karni padegi. Par un sab baaton ko dimag se thodi nikal paungi? Jab bhi shaam ko sab wapas aayenge toh fir wahi sab yaad aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframed that trauma from family insults lingers naturally to validate her continuing fear.
text: Un baaton ka aasaani se nikal jana sach mein mushkil hota hai, kyunki sasural ki aisi baatein aur izzat pe ki gayi aahat ek darr chhod deti hain, jisse jab log samne aate hain tab body ki thakan wapas yaad aane lagti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, par ab main koshish karungi ki agli baar jab wo tana marein toh main itni ghbara na jaun aur body kharab na karu apni. Mujhe zinda rehna hai yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her new duty to herself to protect her health despite the family environment using Lens B.
text: Ab tumhara poora dhyan us ghar mein reh kar unke taano se tootne ki bajaye khud ki sehat ko banaye rakhne wale naye farz par lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi farz hai ab mera khud ke liye. Abhi toh main rasoi mein nahi uthungi, kam se kam ek ghanta yahan bistar par thoda seedhe let kar aaram karungi. Aaj din bohot bhari ho gaya tha mere liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the physical need for rest as a feared consequence of not caring for herself using Lens E.
text: Aaj ke is hadd se zyada thakawat bhare din ke baad, baaki saari ghar ki zimmedariyon ko rok kar bistar par rukhna hi abhi is darr ko door karne ka sahi tareeka lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Aapka bahut shukriya mera dard aur baat sunne ke liye. Aapse dukh baant kar pet ki jalan sach mein kaafi shant ho gayi hai aur chakkar aane bhi band ho gaye hain. Ab main seedha letati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the unexpressed relief and sense of grounding she achieved by sharing her distress.
text: Tumhari baaton mein ab ek gehra SUKOON aur apna waqt lene ka thahrav sunayi de raha hai, aur tumhara khud ko sahara dena sach mein ek bahut badi baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Tension ke mare mere kandho par jaise 100 kilo ka pahaad rakha hai aur poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai
text: Tension ke mare mere kandho par jaise 100 kilo ka pahaad rakha hai aur poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai. Aaj teesri baar devar ka rishta isliye wapas chala gaya kyunki samaj mein baat phail gayi hai ki mere medical issues ki wajah se is ghar mein bacche ki kilkari nahi goonji. Apna career chhod kar maine is ghar ko sambhala, par aaj in baaton se meri aawaz hi nahi nikal rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mandatory Somatization opening: mirror exact body complaint, applying stigma protocol (shorter, soft pause).
text: Aapke shabdon se lag raha hai ki sach mein aapke kandho par jaise 100 kilo ka pahaad rakha hai aur poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul waisa hi lag raha hai. Saasu maa subah se baten suna rahi hain ki main manhoos hoon, meri vajah se devar ki shadi nahi ho rahi. Yeh sab sunkar mera toh jaise dum hi ghutne lagta hai, himmat hi nahi bachi aage sunne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma protocol (soft pause, shorter than seeker text) using relational lens.
text: Saas ki in chubhti hui baaton se aapko lag raha hai ki aapki poori ahmiyat ko hi daav par laga diya gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur nahi toh kya? Maine is ghar ke liye apna acha bhala career chhod diya taki saas aur sasur ki dekhbhal ho sake. Par aaj jab devar ka rishta tootne ki baat aayi, toh meri koi izzat nahi. Main to jaise is parivar ke liye ek daag ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma protocol reflecting the feared consequence of losing her place in the family.
text: Ghar ki izzat aur parivar ki is soch ke aage aapko khud ke wajood aur barabari ko khone ka darr mehsoos ho raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai
text: Koi wajood nahi bacha mera is chaar diwari mein. Main din bhar kitchen mein khadi rehti hoon, sabka dhyaan rakhti hoon, par phir bhi sirf ek medical kami ki wajah se mujhe kos te hain. Aurat ki mehnat ki koi value nahi. Aaj subah se poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe underneath the bodily pain and exhaustion to bring out the core conflict.
text: Is ghutan aur daily ke is dard bhare mahol mein, jab aap kitchen mein akele khadi hokar apne tyag ko andekha hote dekhti hain, toh aage ke bhavishya ko lekar kya sochte hain aap?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhavishya? Andar bas yahi lagta hai ki main phans gayi hoon is ghar mein. Na aage ja sakti hoon, na peeche. Career toh bahut pehle hi khatam ho chuka hai, aur is ghar mein mujhe meri medical report ki wajah se kabhi apnaya nahi jayega. Bas sab kuch andhera lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the specific emotion required for C3+Relational_Preservation feeling trapped and helpless.
text: Lagta hai is saari situation mein, apna career chhodne ke faisle aur ab ghar walon ke in tano ke beech, aap khud ko ek aisi jagah phansa hua aur poori tarah se helpless mehsoos kar rahi hain jahan koi bahar nikalne ka raasta nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Helpless hi hoon. Mujhe toh ab apne aap par gussa aata hai ki maine kyu apni naukri chhodi thi inke liye. Agar main theek thaak kama rahi hoti, toh shayad aaj mujhe in saari baaton par chup nahi rehna padta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the regret and separate her worth from the family's outcome.
text: Ek aurat ka ghar ke liye sab kuch tyag dena humari family structures mein bahut aam duty maani jati hai, aur aapka is tarah gusse aur bebas mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai, halanki in medical reports se aapki mehnat ya izzat par koi asar nahi padta.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai
text: Par unko kaun samjhaye? Woh log toh chahte hain ki main bas kisi tarah unki nazron se door ho jaun. Devar ki shaadi na hone ka poora theekra mere sar par phod diya gaya hai, aur ab toh poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai roz.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time and duration of carrying this heavy burden alone.
text: Itne lambe samay se aap parivar ki is umeed aur phir is blame ka lamba bhoj akele apne andar aur apne sharir par utha rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein thak gayi hoon main is sab se. Har waqt koi naya taana tayar rehta hai inke pas. Aurati hone ka yahi sabse bada dukh hai. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aata ki aisi zindagi jee kar kya fayda jahan koi apnapan hi na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about homemaker women carrying the blame for family issues.
text: Bahuvon ke role mein aisi kai family situations mein maine dekha hai jahan auratein ghar sambhalne ka saara bhoj uthati hain, par jab koi pareshani aati hai, toh sabse pehle unhe hi zimmedar thehra diya jata hai — sirf aapke sath aisa nahi ho raha, par koi izzat ke darr se khul ke bolta nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandho par jaise 100 kilo ka pahaad rakha hai
text: Aap theek keh rahe hain, yeh hum sab ki kahani hai. Par ab kya karoon? Mujhe is jism ke dard se theek hona hai. Mere kandho par jaise 100 kilo ka pahaad rakha hai, use ab thoda utarna hai warna main sach mein kisi din gir padungi choti choti baaton par. Batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 quick, culturally fitting grounding options for the somatic distress.
text: Jab jism is tarah thak jaye aur kandho par itna bojh ho, toh aap 2 choti cheezein try kar sakti hain — ya toh kitchen mein ek gilas gunguna pani lekar chupchap aaram se baith kar use peena, ya fir 2 minute ke liye apne dono hathon ko kandho par rakh kar halke se dabate hue gehari saans lena. Inme se aaj abhi kya asaan lag raha hai aapko?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe lagta hai main gunguna paani pee sakti hoon abhi, kyunki kitchen mein thodi der ke liye shanti hai aur wahan saas mujhe tana maarne nahi aayengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the water grounding exercise step by step.
text: Chaliye isko ekdam aasan tareeqe se ek sath karte hain. Pehle kitchen ke us shant kone mein jakar ek gilas mein gunguna pani le lijiye... phir use dono hathon se pakad kar uski garmahat ko mehsoos kijiye aur dheere dheere ek ghunt pijiye... bas itna hi kijiye aaj is takleef ko todne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine do ghunt piye. Pani ki garmahat se gale ka thoda bojh kam hua, aur saans bhi thodi theek aayi. Par phir wahi darr lagta hai ki shaam ko pati ghar aayenge toh unke samne fir se yahi kalesh shuru hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe for family blame games regarding medical issues.
text: Medical issues ko lekar parivaron mein jo blame game chalta hai, woh darsal samaj ke dar aur dusre ki problems—jaise devar ka rishta tootna—ko chupane ki koshish hota hai, iska sach mein aapki kami ya galti se koi lena dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, log samajhdaar toh banenge nahi bas kisi ko bali ka bakra chahiye unhe. Devar ki pehle bhi aisi aadat rahi hai aur rishte toote hain, bas meri bimari ka nam aage kar diya gaya hai. Par main itne saal inke farz nibhate nibhate khud ko bhool hi gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role and duty realization.
text: Apne career ka tyag karke jis parivar ki izzat aur rishton ko aapne farz man kar poori lagan se apnaya tha, wahan aaj aapko apni hi pehchan dhundhni pad rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Yahi farz ki umeed ne hi mujhe shanti se jeene nahi diya. Ab mujhe lagta hai ki main unke in tano ko apne oopar haavi nahi hone dungi. Main apni pehchan ab unki nazron mein thodi dhundhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength in reclaiming her identity apart from family blame.
text: Aapne bilkul sahi faisla kiya hai ki is parivar ki choti baaton ka asar apne oopar ab aur haavi nahi hone dengi, yeh aapki andaroony takat aur samajhdari dono ko darshata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai
text: Mujhe ye koshish lagataar karni hogi. Kyunki warna har choti baat par mera poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai jaisa haal ho jayega aur main sach mein bimariyon ka ghar ban jaungi. Mujhe apna khayal rakhne ki shuruaat karni hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a small action-oriented question about how she plans to protect herself tonight.
text: Aage ke is naye raste par chalte hue, aaj shaam ko jab pati ghar aayenge aur kalesh ka darr hoga, toh apne sukoon ko bachaye rakhne ke liye aap kya sabse chota kadam uthayengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Jab saas ya pati devar ki shaadi ka mudda uthayenge, toh main wahan unke samne khadi rehkar behes karne ke bajaye apne kamre mein aakar darwaza halka sa band kar lungi. Main sunungi hi nahi unki aawaz.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational boundary setting through physical distancing.
text: Unke tano se physically door hatkar, aap apne aur unke gusse ke beech ek adrishya darwaza khada karne ka poora irada kar chuki hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, wahi ek darwaza zaroori hai. Aaj tak main sanskar aur izzat ki baaton mein chup chaap sunti thi, par ab nahi. Apna aur is jism ka bhoj ab aur nahi badhne dungi main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about how bearing the burden is culturally mandated but not actually her fault.
text: Aksar families apne andar ki kamiyon ko chupaane ke liye badi asani se kisi doosre ki medical situation ko aage kar deti hain, lekin aapne khud dekh liya hai ki aapko us jhute bhoj ko dhone ki koi zaroorat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat toh sau aane sach boli aapne. Jhootha bhoj hi tha yeh, jo unhone apni family ki image bachane ke liye mere sar laad diya tha. Ab aur is dhoke mein nahi jiyungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a simple grounding reminder technique to use in the moment.
text: Kal se jab bhi aisi koi negativity ghar mein shuru ho, toh aap do pal ruk kar ek gehri saans lete hue yaad dila sakti hain ki 'yeh inka dar hai, meri sachai nahi', ya fir apna focus kisi aur zaruri choti cheez par shift kar sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh nuskha acha hai, 'yeh unka dar hai, meri sachai nahi'. Main sach mein bar bar khud ko yehi yaad dilaungi. Aur pati ko bhi saaf saaf is baare mein ek din sukoon se baith kar samjha dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift in role from silent sufferer to an empowered communicator.
text: Ek chup rehne wali bahu ki duty se aage badhkar, aap pati ke samne apne aap ki sahi tasveer aur apni aawaz rakhne ki solid taiyari kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aawaz rakhni padegi, maine is ghar ko aise hi nahi seencha hai pichle saalo mein. Main unhe batayungi ki agar main apna aacha bhala career chhod sakti hoon, toh apne haq ke liye aawaz bhi utha sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her clarity and conviction.
text: Aapki yeh nayi soch aur apne kiye gaye saare tyag ko khud hi pehchanne ka yahi sahi tareeqa hai, jo aapko aage apni baat himmat se rakhne mein badi madad karega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandho par jaise 100 kilo ka pahaad rakha hai
text: Bilkul. Bahut halka lag raha hai ye sab bol ke aapse. Jo lag raha tha ki mere kandho par jaise 100 kilo ka pahaad rakha hai, ab wo kafi halka mehsoos ho raha hai. Main in sab ka dat kar samna karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating affirmation reinforcing her dignity beyond the societal pressure.
text: Mujhe poora vishwas hai ki jab aap is sachai aur apne sukoon ko is tarah sambhal kar rakhengi, toh aap apne kandho se samaj ka saara jhoota bojh permanently utaar dengi, kyunki aapki ahmiyat kisi bhi medical report se kahin upar hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai
text: Mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai, aur mere ghutne aur ediyaan dard se kaanp rahe hain. Aaj rishta party ne devar ko sab kuch dekhne ke baad reject kar diya aur Sasu-maa ne saara ilzaam meri 'khoti kismat' aur maa na ban paane par daal diya hai. Dimaag mein ek aisi bhayankar thakan chha gayi hai ki khade hone ki taaqat nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate somatic distress using Lens A while normalizing the physical reaction to harsh words.
text: Aisi baatein sunkar takleef hona bohot swabhavik hai, aur ab tumhara gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai, aur sasu-maa ki in baaton se tumhare ghutne bhi thakan se kaanp rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul himmat nahi ho rahi ab khade hone ki. Ghar ke saare kaam pade hain, par lag raha hai jaise mere andar kuch bacha hi nahi hai. Sasu-maa ne bhari aangan mein bola ki meri wajah se ghar mein manhoosiyat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational dynamic of being humiliated openly, causing physical paralysis.
text: Bhari aangan mein sabke saamne jab sasu-maa ne manhoosiyat wali aisi chubhne wali baat kahi, toh usne ghar ke kaam karne ki tumhari saari taaqat hi jaise andar se nichod li.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai
text: Sahi me, aur wahi shabd baar baar dimaag mein ghoom rahe hain. Meri khoti kismat ke taane sun sun kar mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai. Kya sach mein mere baanjhpan se devar ka rishta toota?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently probe the self-doubt that arose from the mother-in-law's accusations.
text: Itne bhaari taane sunne ke baad, jab tumhare dimaag mein apne hi kismat aur baanjhpan ke baare mein aise khud ko kosne wale sawal uthte hain, toh kaisa mehsoos hota hai andar se?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise main sach mein ek bojh hoon aur mera koi astitva nahi hai. Samajh nahi aata kisi ko muh kaise dikhaungi. Biradari wale kya kahenge ki is aurat ki parchayi bhi buri hai. Sab kuch jhutha lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue by softly reflecting the fear of societal judgment with a pause.
text: Biradari aur logo ke saamne apni parchayi ko lekar jo darr baith gaya hai, usne andar tumhare ek gehra bojh sa bana diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul ek bojh ban gayi hoon is ghar mein. Meri medical reports theek hain, par blame hamesha mera hi hota hai. Dimaag kaam nahi kar raha, bas gala aur ediyaan bohot dard kar rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Identify the core unexpressed feeling of being trapped and helpless due to misplaced blame.
text: Lagta hai ki sari medical reports theek hone ke bawajood jab saara ilzaam aakar tum par hi girta hai, toh tum is ghar ki in rasmo aur taano ke beech khud ko bohot helpless aur trapped mehsoos karti ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai
text: Trapped hi toh hoon. Na aage jaa sakti hoon na peeche. Pati bhi kuch nahi kehte apni maa ko. Izzat ke chakkar mein sab seh rahi hoon aur chup rehne se mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate that bearing the burden of family honor often causes physical pain in this culture, and separate her worth from the rejection.
text: Hamare yahan aam taur par jab pati chup rehte hain aur ghar ki izzat bachane ka sara bojh bahu par aata hai, toh aisi helplessly sehna aur body pain aana laazmi hai, par rishta tootne ka ilzaam tumhari value ya tumhari kismat tay nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaash sasu-maa yeh samajh paati. Par unko toh bas ek target chahiye tha apna gussa nikalne ke liye. Aur mere ghutne aur ediyo mein toh jaise ab jaan hi nahi bachi hai ki main rasoi tak bhi chalkar jaaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the physical toll the ongoing blame is taking on her mobility.
text: Tumhari body sach mein poori tarah respond kar rahi hai is dabaav ko, jahan ghutne aur ediyo mein itni thakan hai ki rasoi tak jana bhi ab namumkin sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul jaise kisi ne saari taaqat cheen li ho. Shaam ki chai banani hai sabke liye, par samajh nahi aa raha ki kitchen mein jaa kar un logo ka samna kaise karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the anticipated fear of facing the family to build insight into her physical paralysis.
text: Kitchen mein jaa kar sabke taane aur kadwi baatein fir se sunne ka khayal tumhare andar abhi aur kya nayi ghabrahat paida kar raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr lagta hai ki main shayad sach mein pagal na ho jaun in sab baton se. Pata nahi main kab tak yeh andha ilzaam aur taane bina bimaar pade bardasht kar paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the stigma fear of going 'pagal' softly and with a pause.
text: Andar hi andar itna darr baith gaya hai ki roz ke in taano se shayad tumhara apna dimaagi santulan na bigad jaye...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur mujhe theek rehna hai. Mai bimaar nahi padh sakti kyunki aur baatein banengi ki main kaamchor hoon. Main is takleef se thoda theek hona chahti hoon taaki chai bana saku, ab kya karoon kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer quick, practical somatic suggestions to ease her immediate physical symptoms before making tea.
text: Chai banane jane se pehle tum do choti cheezein try kar sakti ho—ya toh wahin baithe baithe 2 minute apni saanson ko ginte hue dhyaan do, ya phir apni ediyo aur ghutno ke neeche koi naram takiya rakh kar unhe thoda aaram do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Takiya lagana theek rahega. Mere ediyo mein sach mein bhari dard hai chalne layak nahi. Saans lene mein toh dhyan wapas sasu-maa ki baaton par hi bhatak jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step-by-step to use the pillow for support.
text: Pehle ek aaramdayak takiya apni ediyo ke niche set kar lo... phir ghutno ko bilkul dheela chhod do thodi der... bas itna hi aaj ke liye apni thakan aur dard kam karne ki koshish karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mene takiya laga liya hai. Thoda better aur naram support lag raha hai pairo ko. Aisa lag raha hai thoda pressure kam hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her somatic relief to reinforce the connection between care and pain reduction.
text: Pairo ko takiye ka support milne se sach mein ab ediyo par padne wala pressure aur dard thoda sambhla hua lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Par samajh nahi aata, hum auraton ko hi har nakamyabi ka doshi kyun bana diya jata hai? Jo cheez mere haath mein nahi hai, jaise rishta walo ka faisla, uski saza mujhe kyun milti hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use a systemic anecdote to normalize her experience of misplaced blame in Indian households.
text: Bahuon par ghar ki har choti badi nakamyabi ka ilzaam aana bahut common pattern hai hamare samaj mein — sirf tumhare saath yeh nahi ho raha, lekin koi bahar isliye nahi bolega kyunki ghar ki izzat bahu ki khamoshi se hi jodi jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul theek kaha. Meri khamoshi ko hi unhone meri 'khoti kismat' maan liya hai aur dosh dete rehte hain. Par ab lag raha hai ki mujhe andar hi andar khud ko kosna band karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlight the shift from self-blame to self-compassion.
text: Apne aap ko itne waqt tak in baaton ke liye bina wajah kosne ke baad, ab aakar tum khud is galat bojh ko utarne ka bada kadam utha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab aur nahi kosungi khud ko. Agar devar ka rishta tuta hai toh usme rishta party walo ka apna hisaab hoga. Meri kismat nahi. Main ab uth kar ek glass paani laane ki himmat karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the rishta rejection as a normal structural issue between families, rather than her personal defect.
text: Yeh yaad rakhna zaroori hai ki rishte pakke hona ya tootna humesha do pariwaron ki apni zaruraton aur pasand ka nateeja hota hai, yeh sach mein kisi aurat ki medical history ya kismat ka dosh nahi hota, bhale hi sasu-maa apna gussa wahan nikal rahi hon.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunkar kaafi himmat aayi hai. Meri kismat sach mein khoti nahi hai. Main paani pi chuki hoon aur abhi kitchen ki taraf chalne ki koshish karti hoon, pairo ka dard pehle se thoda sambhla hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength to separate herself from false accusations and regain her balance.
text: Tumhari andar ki yeh nayi himmat sach mein kabile tareef hai, jo tum un galat ilzaamo se upar uth kar, apni khud ki qadr pehchaan kar wapas kitchen ki taraf aage badhne ki taaqat juta rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar sasu-maa ne phir kuch bola abhi waha, toh main unhe jawaab nahi dungi par dil par bhi nahi lagaungi. Main maan ke chalungi ki unka taana sirf unke ego hurt hone ki wajah se hai, mere wajood ki wajah se nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her internal boundary against her mother-in-law's emotional attacks.
text: Tumne ab yeh tay kar liya hai ki sasu-maa ki kadwi baaton ko aur unke gusse ko tum apne wajood par haavi hone ki ijazat bilkul nahi dogi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai
text: Bilkul nahi. Waise aaj beech beech mein mera gala itna sookh gaya hai ki ek paani ka ghoont peena bhi kaante chubhne jaisa dardnak lag raha hai... par ab jaise main relax mehsoos kar rahi hoon, ye dard khud kam lagne laga hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the physical symptom reducing as she feels more emotionally secure.
text: Yeh jo gale mein itna sookhapan thodi thodi der mein chubhan de raha tha, tumhe khud dikh raha hai ki tumhari andar ki shanti aate hi woh takleef bhi pighalne lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek mehsoos kar rahi hoon ab. Ek do geeta ke paath karungi chai banane ke baad, us se aur shanti mil jayegi. Ghabrahat utni haavi nahi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check if she is completely ready to face the family members now that her somatic distress is manageable.
text: Ghabrahat kam hone aur paath karne ke is nayi soch ke baad, kya ab tum poori tarah se apni un rozmarra ki zimmedariyo ke beech lauthne ke liye taiyaar ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hoon. Aap se baat karke sach me dimaag se ek bhari bojh hat gaya aur ediyo ko bhi takiye se aaram mil gaya. Ab chalti hoon, saara din toh kamre me rote nahi nikal sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close by reinforcing her ability to cope and recover from emotional and physical exhaustion.
text: Bilkul, is bhari thakan aur andhe ilzaamo se nikal kar apni zimmedariyo mein dubara khade hone ki tumhari yeh shakti sach mein asardaar hai; aage kabhi bhi dil baithne lage, toh hum zaroor baat kar lenge.
